meanings.definition: a message whose ingenuity or verbal skill or incongruity has the power to evoke laughter
the trait of appreciating (and being able to express) the humorous
examples: you can't survive in the army without a sense of humor

meanings.definition: a characteristic (habitual or relatively temporary) state of feeling
examples: whether he praised or cursed me depended on his temper at the time
he was in a bad humor
I fail to see the humor in it

meanings.definition: (Middle Ages) one of the four fluids in the body whose balance was believed to determine your emotional and physical state
examples: the humors are blood and phlegm and yellow and black bile

meanings.definition: the liquid parts of the body
